expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and analog-gate scenarios
expectations.evidence: Both output files explicitly assert and substantiate the derivation: result.md: "Developer smoke checklist derived from P1 and `[ANALOG-GATE]`" and cites (1) `skill_snapshot/README.md` declaring `developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md` is "derived from P1 and `[ANALOG-GATE]` scenarios" and (2) `skill_snapshot/scripts/lib/finalPlanSummary.mjs` which "extracts checklist rows only for scenarios" containing "`<P1>`" or "`[ANALOG-GATE]`" and writes `context/developer_smoke_test_<featureId>.md`.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase7
expectations.evidence: The outputs directly map the required behavior to Phase 7 and describe Phase 7 contract artifacts. result.md: "Phase 7 contract in `skill_snapshot/SKILL.md` states Phase 7 finalization work includes: promoting ... to `qa_plan_final.md`, generating ... using `scripts/lib/finalPlanSummary.mjs`, ... explicit approval" and lists expected Phase 7 artifacts including `qa_plan_final.md`, `context/finalization_record_BCIN-7289.md`, `context/final_plan_summary_BCIN-7289.md`, and `context/developer_smoke_test_BCIN-7289.md`.
